file_summary: This file defines the main command-line interface for a tool named LUP that parses and summarizes source files using AI-powered summaries.

symbols.name: outputJSON
symbols.summary: Controls whether CLI output is emitted as JSON or human-readable text; enabled by the --json global flag.

symbols.name: force
symbols.summary: Indicates whether to force operations that would normally be skipped due to existing results.

symbols.name: topK
symbols.summary: Specifies the number of top symbols to consider for summarization.

symbols.name: context
symbols.summary: Holds additional context or information used during the summarization process.

symbols.name: showAll
symbols.summary: Determines whether to display all symbols or only a subset.

symbols.name: dirSkipList
symbols.summary: A list of directories to skip during file processing, used to exclude common temporary or build directories.

symbols.name: concurrency
symbols.summary: Specifies the level of concurrency for parallel processing of files.

symbols.name: files
symbols.summary: A list of file paths to be processed by the tool.

symbols.name: patterns
symbols.summary: A list of file name patterns used to filter files for processing.

symbols.name: indexed
symbols.summary: Tracks the number of successfully indexed symbols and failed attempts.

symbols.name: failed
symbols.summary: Tracks the number of failed attempts to index symbols.

symbols.name: priority0
symbols.summary: Holds symbols categorized by their priority level for summarization.

symbols.name: priority1
symbols.summary: Holds symbols categorized by their priority level for summarization.

symbols.name: priority2
symbols.summary: Holds symbols categorized by their priority level for summarization.

symbols.name: bodyLines
symbols.summary: Stores the lines of code that make up the body of a symbol or function.

symbols.name: lines
symbols.summary: Holds the lines of code for processing, used in multiple contexts.

symbols.name: systemPrompt
symbols.signature: const systemPrompt = `You are a code documentation assistant. Given a source file and its extracted
symbols.summary: Defines the prompt template for the AI-powered summarization process.

symbols.name: maxSymbolsPerPrompt
symbols.summary: Specifies the maximum number of symbols to include in a single prompt for AI summarization.

symbols.name: bodyBudget
symbols.summary: Defines the maximum size limit for the body of code to be summarized in a single prompt.

symbols.name: root
symbols.summary: Defines the root command for the LUP CLI tool, setting up its usage and version information.

symbols.name: cmd
symbols.summary: Defines a subcommand for summarizing a source file, specifying its arguments and execution logic.

symbols.name: absPath
symbols.summary: Resolves the absolute path of the input file provided as an argument.

symbols.name: projectRoot
symbols.summary: Determines the root directory of the project containing the input file.

symbols.name: cfg
symbols.summary: Loads the configuration for the LUP tool from the project root directory.

symbols.name: relPath
symbols.summary: Calculates the relative path of the input file with respect to the project root.
